title: notify dashboard STATUS webhook phase complete
purpose: A6.1 defines notify dashboard status webhook phase complete for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified.
scope: Owns `A6.1` only; siblings under `A6` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §3 — Branch A — Pursuit & control plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#3-branch-a-pursuit-control-plane).
behavior_steps: After each meaningful phase completion—design artifact written, implement task verified with evidence, or goal state transition—journal-keeper invokes [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) `generate-dashboard.py` to regenerate `docs/operator/dashboard.md` and `STATUS.md` without blocking the next pursuit turn.

Configured webhooks fire on milestones (phase complete, H3 pending, goal achieved)—not every conductor turn—so [A3.2](A3.2-goal-autopilot-until-goal-verify-or-hard-block.md) unattended runs remain observable without alert fatigue per [A6.2](A6.2-notify-digest-on-h2-blocker-not-every-step.md).

Notifications dual-write snapshot fields in state.json for headless consumers ([I5.1](I5.1-runtime-notify-status-dashboard-generation.md)) while pursuit continues; notification failure never blocks [A2.2](A2.2-if-ready-execute-one-pipeline-step.md) execution.
Reading STATUS or dashboard output does not clear H2 blockers or substitute for operator action—[A6.3](A6.3-operator-observe-without-unblocking-loop.md) preserves strict HITL separation.

If dashboard regeneration fails, the conductor logs the error and optionally enqueues a platform notification item—pursuit advances only when preflight is READY, not when the operator acknowledged the digest.

Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `A6.1`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Add `goal` block to state template and journal-keeper dual-write (v2.14).
Implement `scripts/goal-verify.py` stub aggregating task evidence paths.
Document `A6.1` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `A6.1`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: A6.1 defines notify dashboard status webhook phase complete for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified. In practice, the system after each meaningful phase completion—design artifact written, implement task verified with evidence, or goal state transition—journal-keeper invokes [s0](b1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) `generate-dashboard.py` to regenerate `docs/operator/dashboard.md` and `status.md` without blocking the next pursuit turn, then configured webhooks fire on milestones (phase complete, h3 pending, goal achieved)—not every conductor turn—so [a3.2](a3.2-goal-autopilot-until-goal-verify-or-hard-block.md) unattended runs remain observable without alert fatigue per [a6.2](a6.2-notify-digest-on-h2-blocker-not-every-step.md).
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-a 2026-06-28 -->

Notifications inform; they do not block pursuit. Phase completion—design artifact published, implement task verified, goal transition—updates `docs/operator/dashboard.md`, `STATUS.md`, and optional webhooks so operators have situational awareness without approving each step.

Regeneration is S0 where `generate-dashboard.py` exists. Webhooks fire on meaningful milestones, not every token, to avoid alert fatigue. This capability satisfies observability for unattended runs while preserving [A6.3](A6.3-operator-observe-without-unblocking-loop.md): reading STATUS never substitutes for H2 resolution.
